description_long: This is a high-performance vehicle wheel featuring a wide, low-profile tire with a smooth, directional tread pattern. The rim is finished in a striking gold color and showcases a multi-piece construction with visible blue bolts around the outer edge, suggesting a beadlock or modular design. The wheel face has a mesh-style spoke pattern with ten split spokes radiating from a central hub, which is branded with 'WORK' and 'MEISTER' logos. The tire sidewall is marked with 'TOYO' branding and additional technical details, indicating a premium or racing application. The inner barrel of the rim is also gold, and the lug nuts are highlighted in blue, adding a custom, performance-oriented aesthetic. The overall design is both functional and visually distinctive, suitable for sports cars or modified vehicles in urban environments.
description: A gold mesh-style vehicle wheel with a wide, smooth, directional tread tire and blue accent bolts, designed for high-performance or custom vehicles. The rim features a multi-piece look with visible branding and blue lug nuts.
description_view_0: Front view of the tire showing the wide, smooth tread with a directional pattern and no visible rim details.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gold mesh rim, blue accent bolts, branded center cap, and blue lug nuts, with 'TOYO' branding on the tire.
description_view_2: Rear view of the tire, similar to the front, showing the tread pattern and the gold rim edge, but no detailed rim face.
description_view_3: Oblique rear view showing the inner barrel of the gold rim and the concave profile, with the tire sidewall and part of the rim lip visible.
attribute_spoke_pattern: Ten split spokes arranged in a mesh pattern, radiating symmetrically from the center hub with a slight concave profile.
attribute_rim_design: Deep-dish, multi-piece style rim with a gold finish, visible blue beadlock bolts around the outer edge, and a branded center cap. The rim has a pronounced lip and a concave face.
attribute_lug_nut_configuration: Five blue lug nuts evenly spaced in a circular pattern around the center hub, exposed and not covered.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: Directional tread pattern with wide, shallow grooves forming a V-shape, optimized for performance and grip on dry surfaces.
